Off Calendar Apr-17-2014 Text Ruling

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-08-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling re: DEFENDANTs DOROTHY MCCORKINDALE and WELLS FARGO INSURANCE SERVICES, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
JUDGE GOLDSMITH IS RECUSED. PER ORDER OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE, To be heard in Department 303 before Judge Kramer. The parties are to meet and confer and contact the clerk at (415) 551-3726 to set the hearing date. The court will not provide a court reporter for this hearing. If any party wishes a reporter, the parties must meet and confer and agree on a single reporter. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2014 Continued To Apr-08-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS DOROTHY MCCORKINDALE, WELLS FARGO INSURANCE SERVICES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued on the Court's own motion to April 8, 2014. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
